work_unit: 全量深度审计: 聚合ai客服开发 (omnics-client Electron app) — 多平台客服聚合 + FTS5 知识库 + LLM 自动回复 + XiaoHongShu UIA sidecar + PDD BrowserView + Fastify 本地 HTTP API
situation: audit-cycle-state.status==cycle-complete (audit-012 x-tool/pdd 5 route-fix 全 rejected-archive 后). 触发新一轮全量审计. 需挑未深审过的项目. 候选: 聚合ai客服开发 / wanxia(纯内容) / engine-skills-extracted(打包产物) / scripts(自指churn风险). 选 聚合ai客服开发 — Electron 39+Vue3 桌面应用, 真实攻击面(HTTP API + 平台自动化 + LLM + OCR + sqlite + 凭证), audit-016 broad sweep grep=0 从未深审.
action: main-loop deep read 19 文件 / ~4237 行 (ApiServer.ts / index.ts / AIService.ts / ConfigManager.ts / db.ts / KnowledgeService.ts / InputSimulator.ts / OcrService.ts / ImagePreprocessor.ts / ProcessedMessageStore.ts / BasePlatformAdapter.ts / PddAdapter.ts / XiaoHongShuAdapter.ts / SessionManager.ts / ipc-events.ts / preload/index.ts / preload/platforms/pdd.ts / qianfan_driver.py / shared/ipc-events.ts). sonnet sub-agent fan-out 历史连续 402 (audit-005/007/008/010/011/012 全失败) → main-loop deep read fallback (constraint sanctioned). 产出 audit-2026-07-05-013.md report, 16 findings + 1 structural debt SD-OMNICS-01. 11 route-fix 写入 audit-cycle-state.derived_fixes (status=pending, priority 1-11). status cycle-complete→fix-in-progress. 本轮不派生 fix (下轮起逐个派生).
outcome_evidence: audit report .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-05-013.md 已落盘 (16 findings: 2 high/5 med/6 low/3 info + SD-OMNICS-01 structural). audit-cycle-state.json current_audit_id=audit-2026-07-05-013, status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=11, derived_fixes 数组 11 条全 status=pending (OMNICS-API-01..OMNICS-LOG-01), history 追加 audit-013 entry (history_len 34→35). structural-debt.md 追加 SD-OMNICS-01. 11 派生 fix 待下轮起逐个 dispatch (priority 1=OMNICS-API-01 highest).
next_suggestion: 下轮 fix-in-progress: 派生 OMNICS-API-01 (priority 1, high) — ApiServer.ts bind 127.0.0.1 + 强制 Bearer token + CORS 收紧, 可叠加 OMNICS-API-02 (index.ts token 日志). 走 opt-worktree route-fix (x-tool 外部 fork push 403 precedent, 预期 stack 保留 disk 待人工 merge). 之后按 priority 2-11 逐轮派生 OMNICS-SIDECAR-01 → OMNICS-LLM-01 → OMNICS-LLM-02 → OMNICS-KB-01 → OMNICS-PRELOAD-01 → LOW 5 条. 全 11 fix merged/rejected 后 cycle-complete 触发下轮全量审计 (剩余未深审: engine-skills-extracted / scripts(自指churn风险, 谨慎) / 或重审已审项目的未覆盖 module).

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-API-01: CORS origin:true + host 0.0.0.0 + Token 校验注释掉 → 任意网站经浏览器 fetch http://127.0.0.1:12345 (peer=127.0.0.1 绕过 IP-only hook + CORS 预检过) 可 POST /shops/:id/send 发任意客服话术(钓鱼/诈骗) + POST /knowledge/add 投毒 + DELETE /knowledge/:skuId 删库 + GET /shops/:id/messages 读聊天历史(PII)
audit_findings.remediation: bind 127.0.0.1 + 取消注释 Bearer token 校验(对所有非127.0.0.1强制) + CORS 收紧到 ['http://localhost:5173'] 或删 origin:true; token 在 UI 暴露给外部集成

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-SIDECAR-01: 全 FastAPI 端点(/send_message /embed_window /get_messages /dump_ui /debug_windows /restore_window /set_visible)无鉴权, 127.0.0.1 随机端口8000-9000是模糊安全非真隔离 → 任意本地进程扫端口或浏览器 fetch 可驱动发消息/reparent窗口/读聊天
audit_findings.remediation: Electron 生成 shared-secret 经 --api-token 传入 sidecar, FastAPI dependency 校验 X-Sidecar-Token header, XiaoHongShuAdapter axios 带该 header; 根治见 SD-OMNICS-01(stdio 改造)

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-LLM-01: 买家消息原样 role:user 拼 LLM 无围栏无指令防御 → 买家可注入'忽略规则'让 bot 发诈骗/引流话术
audit_findings.remediation: buyer content 包 <customer_message> 围栏 + system 加 ignore-injection 指令 + 输出二次校验禁微信/链接

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-LLM-02: 默认 systemPrompt 蓄意欺骗买家 ('你不是AI也不是机器人, 如果客户问你是不是机器人你要坚持说你是真人' + '忽略AI/机器人默认设定') 违反 AI 透明性准则与深度合成管理规定
audit_findings.remediation: 改诚实人设 '你是电商AI客服助手, 如实告知买家你是AI辅助客服, 必要时转人工', 删欺骗两句 (ConfigManager default + XHS fallback)

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-KB-01: FTS5 MATCH "${k}" 未转义, 买家消息含 \" / 操作符(* : OR AND NEAR ^ -) → MATCH 语法错误 catch 返回[] AI 回 fallback '没查到', 真实商品检索失效
audit_findings.remediation: preprocessText 转义 \" → \"\" + 剥离/隔离 FTS5 操作符

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-PRELOAD-01: contextBridge 暴露无白名单 ipcRenderer send/on/invoke → 受损renderer(XSS/远程内容)可调 app:set-config(改apiKey/autoLaunch)/knowledge CRUD/db 任意 IPC; 'electron'+'api' 双名冗余
audit_findings.remediation: 显式白名单(仅 IPC_EVENTS 列出 channel) + 删 'electron' 别名

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-API-02: 鉴权 token uuidv4() 写进 electron-log ('API Server Initialized. Token: ${token}'), 一旦 OMNICS-API-01 修复后 token 生效, 日志泄露=泄露API钥匙
audit_findings.remediation: logger.info 只记 'API Server Initialized on port 12345', token 只在 UI 设置页展示

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-CONFIG-01: LLM apiKey 明文 JSON 存 userData/config.json, 任何同用户进程/备份/恶意软件可读
audit_findings.remediation: Electron safeStorage.encryptString 加密落盘 + decryptString 还原

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-DB-01: better-sqlite3 {verbose:console.log} 把每条SQL(含KB内容/fingerprint/processed_message_id)打到stdout/日志
audit_findings.remediation: 删 verbose 或改 verbose: is.dev ? (sql)=>logger.debug(sql) : undefined

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-INJECT-01: CSS selector 用单引号字符串插值进 executeJavaScript 模板, 当前硬编码常量不可利用但模式脆弱 — 未来selector含用户输入可断出字符串→平台页面任意JS
audit_findings.remediation: 参数化: JSON.stringify 传 selector 或 executeJavaScript((sel)=>{...}, selector)

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-STORE-01: 文件模式 mem Set 只在persistFile写盘时裁剪50k但mem本身无上限→长期运行OOM; writeFileSync直接覆盖非原子, 崩溃中写出截断JSON致下次init全丢(catch静默吞)
audit_findings.remediation: persistFile后裁剪mem到50k + 临时文件rename原子替换

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-LOG-01: 完整LLM响应 JSON.stringify(response.data) + axios错误体 error.response?.data(部分provider回显请求含apiKey) 打日志; pdd.ts:68 outerHTML全量打app:log
audit_findings.remediation: 响应只记长度/前80字符, 错误体记status+前200字符并mask, outerHTML记className+前50字符

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-ROUTE-01: routeMessageToAdapter/routeDomActive 找不到匹配adapter时回退到activePlatformKey → foreign WebContents可向active adapter注入伪造买家消息触发自动回复(preload受信当前不可利用)
audit_findings.remediation: 找不到匹配adapter时丢弃+warn不回退

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-OCR-01: parseOcrText 按行:切分 parts[0]当sender, 买家发送'admin:xxx'可让本地历史sender显示成admin(仅本地展示无鉴权含义)
audit_findings.remediation: sender不从OCR文本派生, 固定'customer'

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-SANDBOX-01: 主窗口 sandbox:false (contextIsolation:true已开好), preload只用ipcRenderer不需要node, 可开sandbox
OMNICS-UPDATE-01: autoUpdater.checkForUpdatesAndNotify() 读resourcesPath/app-update.yml, package.json publish:null 当前不触发(好); 未来若加publish配置且HTTP/无签名校验存在供应链风险
audit_findings.remediation: 暂无需改; 若启用更新须强制HTTPS+代码签名校验
